description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern rifles, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple muzzle device, likely a slant compensator or flash hider. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features iron sights and a standard barrel with a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's end and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
